title: Load payment sessions on startup; resend last message for in-flight sessions
description: On chat startup (after auth, before the event loop): load all sessions from wallet_store.all_sessions(). Populate the in-memory HashMap. For sessions in state Requested (payer) or AddressProvided (payee), check if the peer is online in the DirectoryList. If online: resend the last outgoing PaymentAction to re-sync state (payer resends Request, payee resends Address). Log '[payment] Resumed <n> active sessions.' This handles app restart mid-negotiation.
